underlying_goal: Deliberate on the signal lifecycle closed-loop gap in their GSD workflow system, including improving epistemological grounding of the deliberation process itself
friction_detail: Claude made false claims about codebase state without checking, and the AskUserQuestion tool returned a phantom empty answer that Claude didn't detect.
brief_summary: User initiated a deliberation on signal lifecycle gaps, which evolved into a deep philosophical discussion about epistemological grounding (falsificationism vs pluralism), resulting in updated philosophy docs and deliberation skill improvements.
